note: Career categories by culture. Vision-validated against AiG p.26-41; God Forgot is caste-based, Lunar Provincial is Civilised, and Tarshite characters choose Lunar Provincial or Sartarite.

careers_by_culture.source: OCR text: 'All Primitive careers (see RUNEQUEST page 40)'
OCR text: 'All Civilised (see page 40 of RUNEQUEST)'

careers_by_culture.reference: Adventures in Glorantha p.31; RuneQuest career lists by caste
careers_by_culture.source: Dronars: Beast Handler, Courtesan, Crafter, Entertainer, Farmer, Fisher, Herder, Hunter, Merchant, Miner, Sailor, Scout, Thief. Holars/Horali: Warrior. Zzistori: Sorcerer. Talar: Agent, Alchemist, Courtier, Official, Scholar, Warrior.
Inferred from culture_type Civilised; mechanical section not in OCR
Inferred from culture_type Nomad; mechanical section not in OCR

careers_by_culture.reference: Adventures in Glorantha p.34, p.39; RuneQuest page 40
careers_by_culture.source: Lunar Provincial uses Any Civilised careers. Tarshite characters choose either Lunar Provincial or Sartarite culture.
Inferred from culture_type Barbarian; mechanical section not in OCR
Inferred from culture_type Primitive; mechanical section not in OCR

validation_method: PDF page render/OCR validation against Adventures in Glorantha GenCon preview p.26-41.
